title: Psilocybin therapy increases cognitive and neural flexibility in patients with major depressive disorder.

assets.abstract: Psilocybin has shown promise for the treatment of mood disorders, which are often accompanied by cognitive dysfunction including cognitive rigidity. Recent studies have proposed neuropsychoplastogenic effects as mechanisms underlying the enduring therapeutic effects of psilocybin. In an open-label study of 24 patients with major depressive disorder, we tested the enduring effects of psilocybin therapy on cognitive flexibility (perseverative errors on a set-shifting task), neural flexibility (dyn

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.
